prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 monochrome sepia anime illustration of an androgynous young noble with silvery white tousled layered hair, posed in a melancholic Victorian-gothic garden scene. The character wears a glossy white ruffled blouse with a high frilled collar, a black ribbon bow at the neck, one visible white glove touching the cheek, and one visible cuff with exactly 3 round buttons. Their long hair is tied into one low side ponytail over the right shoulder. Place one ornate antique hand mirror along the left side, with carved metallic floral scrollwork, reflecting the character’s downcast face and closed or half-lidded eye. Add an opaque centered square censor block in muted warm gray-taupe covering the main face area, about one third of the image width, with sharp clean edges. Surround the portrait with white flowers: exactly 3 large orchid blossoms in the upper background, plus multiple clusters of small five-petal white flowers near the right side and lower left foreground. Use delicate manga linework, painterly grayscale shading, soft highlights, intricate hair strands, romantic dark foliage, shallow depth of field, high detail, elegant sorrowful mood, no text, no watermark.
